name: jspsi
description: JavaScript implementation of private set intersection for record linkage.
author: Vincent Dorie <vdorie@gmail.com>

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/cli/tsconfig.test.json && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/core -w apps/cli -w apps/web
